elements.original_description: A cartoon-style hand holding a credit report, with a concerned expression on the face. Pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist cartoon illustration. A hand holds a sheet of paper representing a credit report. The illustration style is clean flat vector art with high contrast and no shading or gradients. The face in the scene has a clearly concerned and worried expression. The background is pure, seamless white. There are no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks of any kind. The mood is serious and tense, reflecting the concept of a score dropping.
